text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The last day of summer camp is finally here.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Excelente! Camp sure was awesome, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Not only did I knock out my training, I solved a
huge mystery!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Why do I want to become the world's strongest
racer? What lies beyond that dream?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: It's aaall clear to me now!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: To entertain... That is what drives El Condor Pasa.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to the summer festival, the clouds in her
mind have dissipated.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Which means this fall isn't just about the
champion's road and becoming the world's
strongest racer...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
It's about getting the crowd hyped for a battle
between rivals and friends—the world's most
awesome show!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
And in the center of the ring, the spotlight will be
on me! I'll be a great sun shining brighter and
stronger than anyone else!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
In which case, just running and winning won't be
enough.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
There's gotta be a way to get everyone even
more excited...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa is deep in thought trying to find a
way to both aim for victory and make the fall
races more enticing. I have an idea.
choice_data_list: What if we hold an event?
What if we hold an event?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Qué? An event?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Let's see... Event... Event...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, I get it... I can get people excited outside
of races too, can't I?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Trash-talking before the races, meet and greets,
winning concerts...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: If we throw an event like that, then...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Bueno, Trainer! This is gonna be hella fun!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The summer fireworks have stopped. In its place, I
can hear the new fall festival music.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Well, let's go back to Tracen Academy. We've
got a fiesta to throw before the Japan Cup!
